resources.string: Current mode
Dual space not created. Please finish initial setup first.
Shizuku mode active. Enhanced capabilities enabled.
Normal mode. Core dual-app features available.
Switched to Normal mode
Shizuku connected · switched to Shizuku mode
Shizuku is not ready. Please start the Shizuku service and grant authorization first.
Requesting Root authorization from the system…
Root authorization granted · switched to Root mode
Root authorization not granted. Mode unchanged.
Entire space frozen
Entire space unfrozen
Dual space is not ready yet. Go to Settings → Repair dual space.
No clones to freeze yet — clone an app from the main space first
No apps available to resume in the dual space
%1$d clone(s) could not be frozen (usually device-admin apps or apps running in the foreground). Close them and try again.
%1$d clone(s) could not be unfrozen. Please try again shortly.
No clones could be frozen — usually because they are device-admin apps or running in the foreground. Close those apps (or revoke their device-admin in system settings) and try again.
No clones could be unfrozen. Please try again shortly.
Checking for updates…
You\'re on the latest version (%1$s)
Update check failed. Check your connection and retry.
Suspend failed: %1$s. Export the diagnostic log for details.
Resume failed: %1$s. Export the diagnostic log for details.
Opening dual-space setup…
Repairing dual space…
Repair failed: %1$s
Android did not resume the work profile
Dual space is already ready
Reconnecting dual space…
Opened the dual space. Return to PrismSpace and retry after it reconnects.
PrismSpace diagnostic report
Sharing diagnostic report…
Diagnostic report attached: %1$s
Export failed: %1$s
PrismProbe is not installed and cannot be opened.
Failed to open PrismProbe: %1$s
Used: %1$dMB / Max: %2$dMB · Threads: %3$d · Cores: %4$d
Shizuku is not installed and cannot be opened.
Failed to open Shizuku.
Shizuku authorization requested…
Shizuku authorization request failed: %1$s
